name: windows-environment-variables
title: Windows Environment Variables
description: View, search, edit and manage Windows environment variables and PATH entries. A keyboard-first alternative to the Windows Environment Variables dialog.
author: ohmycodedev

commands.name: list-envvars
commands.title: List Environment Variables
commands.subtitle: Windows Environment Variables
commands.description: Browse, search, copy, edit and delete Windows environment variables

commands.name: edit-path
commands.title: Edit PATH Variable
commands.subtitle: Windows Environment Variables
commands.description: View, add, remove and reorder PATH entries with validation

commands.name: add-envvar
commands.title: Add Environment Variable
commands.subtitle: Windows Environment Variables
commands.description: Create a new user or system environment variable
